AAI.caption: Locale
AAI.doc: The locale to use for formatting. e.g.: en-US, de-DE, pt-BR, ja-JP
AAI.name: locale

AAJ.caption: Compact display
AAJ.doc: Only used when notation is "compact". "short" (1.2K), "long" (1.2 thousand).
AAJ.name: compactDisplay

AAO.caption: Advanced options (JSON)
AAO.doc: Direct access to the Intl.NumberFormat options object as JSON. When provided, ALL other options above (except locale) are ignored. Must be valid JSON.
AAO.name: advanced_options

AAS.caption: Style
AAS.doc: The formatting style. "decimal" for plain numbers, "currency" for money, "percent" for percentages, "unit" for measurements.
AAS.name: style

AAU.caption: Currency code
AAU.doc: ISO 4217 currency code. Required when style is "currency". e.g.: USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, BRL
AAU.name: currency

AAV.caption: Currency display
AAV.doc: How to display the currency. "symbol" ($), "narrowSymbol" ($), "code" (USD), "name" (US dollars).
AAV.name: currencyDisplay

AAW.caption: Unit
AAW.doc: The unit to use when style is "unit". e.g.: kilometer-per-hour, liter, celsius, mile, byte, kilogram, percent. See MDN for full list.
AAW.name: unit

AAX.caption: Unit display
AAX.doc: How to display the unit. "long" (16 litres), "short" (16 l), "narrow" (16l).
AAX.name: unitDisplay

AAZ.caption: Minimum fraction digits
AAZ.doc: Minimum number of decimal places. e.g.: 2 means 1 → 1.00
AAZ.name: minimumFractionDigits

ABA.caption: Maximum fraction digits
ABA.doc: Maximum number of decimal places. e.g.: 2 means 1.2345 → 1.23
ABA.name: maximumFractionDigits

ABB.caption: Use grouping (thousands separator)
ABB.doc: Whether to use grouping separators (e.g., commas in 1,000,000). "auto" follows locale, "always" forces it, "false" disables it.
ABB.name: useGrouping

ABC.caption: Sign display
ABC.doc: When to show the +/- sign. "auto" (only negative), "always" (+1, -1), "exceptZero" (+1, -1, 0), "negative" (-1 only), "never".
ABC.name: signDisplay

AAD.caption: Compacted number
AAD.doc: Legacy: the number compacted via Intl.NumberFormat. Same as 'Formatted number'.
AAD.name: compacted_number

ABD.caption: Formatted number
ABD.doc: The number formatted according to the selected style, notation, and locale.
ABD.name: formatted_number

ABE.caption: Formatted parts (JSON)
ABE.doc: The formatToParts() output as a JSON string. Each part has a 'type' and 'value'. Useful for custom rendering.
ABE.name: formatted_parts

ABF.caption: Error message
ABF.doc: Empty when formatting succeeds. Contains an error message if formatting fails (e.g., invalid currency code, bad JSON in advanced options).
ABF.name: error_message
